creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #2)

> <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=loader_simp&sektion=8&manpath=FreeBSD+14.0-current>

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=loader.conf&sektion=5&manpath=FreeBSD+14.0-current#SEE_ALSO>: 

* for loader.conf(5) in FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT 

* lacks a cross-reference to the page for loader_simp(8) in FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT
